title: DRDO CFEES Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 15 Posts
organization: Centre for Fire Explosive and Environment Safety (DRDO CFEES)
short_info: Centre for Fire Explosive and Environment Safety (DRDO CFEES) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released on 20-05-2026 on the official website drdo.gov.in. A total of 15 vacancies have been announced through the DRDO CFEES Paid Internship Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 28 years who are pursuing UG (Final Year) Engineering or pursuing PG (Final Year) Science courses are eligible to apply for these Paid Internship vacancies. The offline application process for DRDO CFEES Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 has started on 20-05-2026 and will remain open until 05-06

qualification.education_qualification: Pursuing UG (Final Year) Engineering Students, Pursuing PG (Final Year) Science Students
qualification.details: Environmental science/ Engineering: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year) Electronics / Electronic & Communication Engineering / Electronic Telecommunication / Electronic & Instrumentation / Embedded System Engineering: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year) Mechanical / Automation Engineering: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year) Chemical Engineering / Chemistry: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year) AI&ML / Data Science: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year) Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology: Engineering Students: Pursuing UG (Final Year) / Science Students: Pursuing PG (Final Year)

vacancy_details.Post Name: Electronics / Electronic & Communication Engineering / Electronic Telecommunication / Electronic & Instrumentation / Embedded System Engineering

selection_process: Merit based on academic track record (≥80% marks or ≥8.0 CGPA) Referral letter from Principal/Director Shortlisting Document Verification at joining
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO CFEES Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
